title: Toolhouse Agent
description: Represents an AI agent in the Toolhouse platform, including its configuration, tools, schedules, and execution metadata.

agentId.description: Unique identifier for the agent (UUID format).

description.description: Detailed description of what the agent does.

type.description: The type of entity this schema represents.

slug.description: URL-friendly vanity slug for the agent.

model.description: The LLM model used by the agent (e.g., gpt-4, claude-3).

system_prompt.description: System prompt that defines the agent's behavior and personality.

is_public.description: Whether the agent is publicly accessible without authentication.

tools.description: Collection of tools available to the agent.

bundles.description: Tool bundles assigned to the agent.

files.description: Files attached to the agent for RAG or reference.

schedule.description: Scheduled execution configuration for the agent.

auth_required.description: Whether Bearer token authentication is required to invoke the agent.

theme.description: Visual theme customization for the agent.

ToolSet.description: A collection of tools available to an agent.

installed.description: List of tools installed and available for the agent.

Tool.description: A single tool that can be executed by an agent.

description.description: Description of what the tool does.

inputs.description: JSON Schema describing the tool's input parameters.

Bundle.description: A named collection of tools grouped together.

AgentFile.description: A file attached to an agent.

Schedule.description: Scheduled execution configuration using cron expressions.

cron_expression.description: Cron expression defining the execution schedule.

is_active.description: Whether the schedule is currently active.

ThemePreference.description: Visual theme customization for the agent UI.

Monetization.description: Monetization configuration for a paid agent.

is_monetized.description: Whether the agent charges for access.

InputSchema.description: Schema describing the input parameters for a tool or operation.

required.description: List of required input parameter names.

properties.description: Map of parameter names to their type definitions.

InputParameter.description: Definition of a single input parameter.

type.description: The data type of the parameter.

default.description: Default value for the parameter when not provided.

format.description: Format hint for the parameter value, such as 'email', 'uri', or 'date-time'.
